statement: In every magma, Equation 1527 (`x = (y * y) * (y * (x * z))`) implies Equation 356 (`x * y = z * (w * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0483
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y y) (op y (op x z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op w z))
